textPlain: Unfortunately, WebSmell-o-Vision has not yet been unilaterally pushed by the dudes at Google to do this news justice, but as a croissant connaisseur I would have at least appreciated a webp of the thing instead of some random archive image. It’s a stamp, for christ’s sake.There is a pic here and it’s quite nice imo: https://www.wopa-plus.com/en/stamps/product/&pid=105515
Do they taste buttery when you lick them?
La Poste might have invented the first non-vegan stamps in history.I hope they don't turn rancid.
Try and find a good one in France. Harder than you’d think
